stimulus: In the mid-twentieth century, Celia Cruz and other Cuban ______blank across the United States to the dynamic rhythms of salsa music. The genre soon became a staple of urban dance scenes from Miami to New York.
stem: Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
rationale:
Choice C is correct. The plural nouns “singers” and “listeners” correctly indicate multiple singers introducing the music to multiple listeners.

Choices A, B, and D all incorrectly add possessive apostrophes to one or both nouns when no possession is needed.
